channel.title: Models on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Models on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: github: Copilot cloud agent: Fast, cost-efficient models for simple tasks
item.description:
GitHub Copilot cloud agent now supports additional models, letting users choose fast, cost-efficient options for simpler tasks. The change expands the set of models available when delegating work to the cloud agent.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Grok Code Fast 1 deprecated
item.description:
GitHub deprecated Grok Code Fast 1 across all GitHub Copilot experiences on May 15, 2026. The deprecation applies to Copilot Chat, inline edits, ask and agent modes, and code completions.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Copilot Student GPT-5.3-Codex removal from model picker
item.description:
GitHub is removing GPT-5.3-Codex from the Copilot Student plan’s model picker starting today. The model is still available when using auto model selection.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: ai: What’s new in Microsoft Foundry | March 2026
item.description:
March 2026 Foundry updates include Agent Service GA with private networking, new GPT-5.4 and GPT-5.4 Mini models, Priority Processing, Phi-4 Reasoning Vision, SDK 2.0 GA across major languages, additional Fireworks AI and NVIDIA Nemotron models, and third-party guardrails from Palo Alto and Zenity.

  • Source: Microsoft AI Foundry Blog

item.title: ai: What’s new in Microsoft Foundry | February 2026
item.description:
February 2026 updates add new/updated foundation models (Claude 4.6, GPT Realtime/Audio 1.5, Grok 4.0 GA), advance the Microsoft Agent Framework to Release Candidate, and move Foundry REST API v1 to GA.

  • Source: Microsoft AI Foundry Blog

item.title: github: Grok Code Fast 1 is now available in Copilot Free auto model selection
item.description:
GitHub Copilot Free’s auto model selection now includes Grok Code Fast 1, which is generally available.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Upcoming deprecation of Gemini 3 Pro and GPT-5.1 models
item.description:
GitHub Copilot will deprecate the Gemini 3 Pro and GPT-5.1 models across all Copilot experiences on a specified deprecation date, with replacement models recommended.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Improved web search in Copilot on github.com
item.description:
Copilot Chat on github.com now supports model-native web search for certain models, allowing those models to use their built-in web browsing capability during chats.

  • Source: GitHub
